title: Cold front approaching Western Cape on Thursday
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - A cold front is...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - A cold front is approaching on Thursday and is expected to make landfall on Friday, bringing scattered showers to the Western Cape.

The rest of the country will remain cool to warm but hot in KwaZulu Natal.

Extremely high fire danger conditions are expected over the eastern parts of the Central Karoo and the Little Karoo on Thursday.


> Strong winds and rough seas are expected to develop along the Southern Cape coast from Thursday, spreading to the southern interior and south coast of the country by Friday.


Weather outlook for Thursday 8 August


> Friday 9 August


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
